info.title: Waymate API
info.description: Carpooling backend powering the Waymate web app.

get.description: Readiness probe — verifies the API process is responsive and the database is reachable.
Returns the current user data
Returns all available European country codes
Returns all available car brands
Returns car models for a given brand
Returns the current user's cars

post.description: Creates a new car for the current user

patch.description: Updates whether the current user's car is active

get.description: Returns cities matching the query prefix, ranked by population. Used by the ride creation and search forms to restrict stop selection to known cities.
Returns upcoming planned rides available for booking
Search rides between two cities on a specific date
Returns rides created by the authenticated driver

post.description: Creates a new ride as a driver

get.description: Returns ride details including all confirmed passengers

patch.description: Cancels a ride and cascades cancellation to all active passenger bookings
Marks the driver's ride as COMPLETED and carries confirmed bookings to COMPLETED, opening the review window

get.description: Returns all pending booking requests for rides offered by the authenticated driver
Returns bookings created by the authenticated passenger filtered by timeframe

post.description: Passenger creates a pending request to join a ride. Price is calculated automatically.

patch.description: Driver cancels a pending or confirmed passenger booking for their own ride
Driver confirms a passenger's pending booking request
Driver rejects a passenger's pending booking request

post.description: Submit a 1-5 star review with an optional comment for a co-traveller of a completed ride

get.description: Returns visible reviews and the average rating for a target user
Returns reviews authored by the current user

post.description: File a moderation report against another user. The reporter must share at least one ride with the target (driver↔passenger, in either direction). Optional rideId carries the context the report was filed from.

get.description: Returns aggregated platform statistics for the admin dashboard: weekly ride/revenue charts, popular routes, and user metrics.
Returns a keyset-paginated list of users for admin tooling. Supports a case-insensitive substring search across email, firstName, lastName.
Returns full user detail plus the most recent status history entries (newest first, capped at 50). changedBy is null for system-triggered changes or when the actor admin no longer exists.

patch.description: Changes a user's account status (ACTIVE / SUSPENDED / BANNED / DELETED) and records an audit row in user_status_history.

get.description: Returns a keyset-paginated list of rides for admin tooling. Supports filtering by status and case-insensitive driver email/firstName/lastName search.
Returns full ride detail (driver, car, stops, prices, bookings) plus the most recent status history entries (newest first, capped at 50). changedBy is null for system-triggered changes.
Returns a keyset-paginated list of reviews for moderation. Supports filtering by status, rating range, and case-insensitive search across comment text and author/subject email/name.
Returns counts of non-deleted reviews grouped by status (all, visible, hidden) for admin tab badges.

delete.description: Permanently soft-deletes a review. The review is removed from all public surfaces and excluded from rating aggregates.

get.description: Returns full review detail (author, subject, ride context) plus the most recent status history entries (newest first, capped at 50).

patch.description: Changes a review's moderation status (VISIBLE / HIDDEN / REMOVED) and records an audit row in review_status_history. The reason is required so the moderation log makes the action traceable.

Force-cancels a ride as admin and cascades cancellation to all active passenger bookings (PENDING/CONFIRMED). Records an audit row in ride_status_history with the admin as changedByUserId. The reason is required so the audit log makes the override traceable.

get.description: Returns a keyset-paginated list of user reports for moderation. Supports filtering by status, type, and case-insensitive search across description and reporter/target email/name.
Returns full report detail (reporter, target, ride context if present, resolution reason) plus the status history (newest first, capped at 50).

patch.description: Moves a report through its workflow: OPEN→INVESTIGATING (no reason), OPEN/INVESTIGATING→RESOLVED or DISMISSED (reason required). RESOLVED and DISMISSED are terminal. Records an audit row in report_status_history with the admin as changedByUserId.
